basis.founded: 2025 — publicly launched April 2025, built in Mumbai by a husband-wife duo.
basis.target_market: Retail traders, student traders, value-conscious global market (strong India + global pitch). Targets ~15,000+ traders per about-page.
basis.pricing_model: One-time lifetime: ₹6,599 (India) or $159 globally. 7-day money-back guarantee. No subscription. Positions explicitly against monthly-fee competitors.

ai_features.ai_scope: Per-portfolio pattern detection across all logged trades; per-period natural-language Q&A. Not advertised as per-playbook or per-trade unit specifically.
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Mostly pull (user asks chat questions like 'Which setups have highest win rate?'). Some reactive pattern surfacing ('AI finds patterns you miss—like identifying when you lose 78% of Friday trades').
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not disclosed; pattern detection becomes meaningful at higher sample sizes [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not publicly disclosed. Likely OpenAI or Anthropic via API given the chat UX, but JournalPlus does not advertise the underlying model. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: Conversational chat (text) + auto-surfaced pattern callouts in dashboard.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Marketed example prompts: 'What's my win rate on morning breakouts when VIX is above 20?', 'Which setups have highest win rate?', 'How do my trades perform after a losing streak?'. Auto-detected insights example: 'You lose 78% of Friday trades.' AI is positioned to replace manual filtering/pivoting.

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: structured-rules. JournalPlus has an explicit Playbook feature where users document setup criteria before entering trades. Used to monitor strategy adherence. Not advertised as AI-coached on the playbook itself.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Limited — AI lets users ask setup-level questions ('What's my win rate on morning breakouts?') so the AI reasons across setup cohorts, but there is no advertised per-playbook auto-generated coaching report. The setup-level analysis is user-driven via natural-language queries rather than AI auto-curating per-playbook insights.
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Playbook feature tracks 'strategy adherence' but no quantified compliance percentage metric explicitly marketed. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Offers a free pre-trade and post-trade checklist template (PDF + Google Sheets) covering market conditions, setup confirmation, risk parameters. Pre-trade is checklist-based, not AI-validated against historical performance before entry. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Free trading-journal templates (Excel, Google Sheets, Notion, PDF) provided; specific named setup templates (FVG, VWAP, etc.) not advertised as in-app library [uncertain].

privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: Effectively $0/mo amortized after one-time $159 (lifetime). No separate AI-feature charge.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: No native crypto-exchange API auto-sync advertised. Trade import is CSV-based and supports 'any broker worldwide' including Interactive Brokers, Schwab, Robinhood, Zerodha, IG, etc. Hyperliquid/Blofin/MEXC not listed as native integrations. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Stocks, futures, forex, options, crypto (via CSV).
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Not explicitly advertised. CSV-based import means partial fills depend on the broker's CSV format. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: AI can answer setup × session questions on demand (e.g. 'morning breakouts when VIX > 20'), but no automated per-setup × session breakdown report advertised. [uncertain]

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: Between surface_metrics and deep_pattern_analysis. AI surfaces concrete time/day patterns ('78% Friday losses') and emotional pattern callouts, but coaching is reactive Q&A rather than structured causal coaching frameworks.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: AI 'spots emotional patterns, time-based trends, and strategy weaknesses' — specific named metrics (Tiltmeter, revenge-detection, FOMO-tag) not explicitly marketed. [uncertain]

community.community_driven_ai: Comparison content/templates published, but no in-app shared AI-template marketplace advertised. [uncertain]
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Publicly launched April 2025; AI chat is core to current marketing. Specific AI-feature changelog cadence not public [uncertain].
